name: Caribou Meat Pie
recipeIngredient: or 1 1/2 lb Stewing meat, coarsely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté meat, garlic, and onions in heated oil until the meat has browned.
2. Transfer to a large saucepan. Add water, herbs, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper.
3. Bring to a boil, reduce heat. Simmer 30 minutes if using ground meat or 1 hour if using cubed meat.
4. Add potatoes and carrots, cook for an additional 20 minutes.
5. Remove bay leaf. Make a slurry of flour and water, stir into the sauce until thickened.
6. Add peas. Allow to boil until thickened.
7. Preheat oven according to pie crust package instructions.
8. Place bottom crust in a pie pan. Pour meat mixture over the top.
9. Cover with remaining crust, flute edges. Cut slits on top.
10. Bake until crust is nicely browned, about 15-20 minutes.
